name: DarkFighter
short_description: A round based light RogueLike game with three gameplay modes: find the goddess statue, purify the earth, or equip and defeat the minions of the Black Emperor. Along the way, you may encounter a lost knight, a divine dragon from a foreign land, and fight against the ultimate demon king, Hades.
detailed_description:
Story background

This is a story about the adventures of the brave. In the past, the battle of the gods turned the world into a demon world, and the mainland was dominated by Hads.

The brave woke up from a deep sleep and set foot on the road to find the gods and find themselves.

Gameplay

The game is divided into three play modes.

The first mode is the tower climbing mode. By collecting cards, a card library is built, and cards are randomly selected after entering the battle, and the corresponding cards are played to cause a fatal blow to the enemy.

The second mode is regional mode, where you need to find the statues in each area before the portal can appear and choose equipment to defeat the enemy in the battle.

The third mode is Boss Lien Chan. Using the role data of regional mode, all boss can be challenged continuously.

About fighting

There are rich monsters on the map and 7 different styles of Boss battles, each of which has a unique fighting mechanism. Of course, you can also pass grade rolling or props.

To win the battle.

In the powerful Boss battle, the shield-breaking mechanism is an important strategic means. You need to observe the enemy's hand and singing time, and rationally allocate physical strength and magic value.

Physical strength value: used for charge attack or magic. After charge attack, the attack command will do multiple damage. The magic command after charge attack will do more damage. [/h2]

Magic value: When dealing with boss, if the enemy is magic armor, you need to beat magic damage rhythmically to break the shield, but you should master yourself.

When your mana is empty, you can recharge your mana through defense.

Defense mechanism: When facing the enemy's powerful moves, you can defend, and defense will provide you with 50% damage reduction by default.

Anger skill: Attack or magic damage will accumulate anger value. When the anger value is full, you can use anger skill, which will be a full-screen spike skill.

random event

Players will play an amazing teenager in the game, constantly defeating the enemies in the game and slaughtering hell on the way of exploration and turn-based fighting.

In the world view of this game, Hei Di, the king of the underworld, enters the world with his own army, and the player will play the role of a savior to defeat the enemy and save the world.

An initial platform is added to the game, where you can have a rest, chat with women and play small games.

About us

Guqingquan

Qq：753128402

Qingquan personal game studio

Qq group: 588184539

Bilibili: .
